pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage introducing the conservation initiative and linking to key tools, events, and learning resources.
primary_functions: Highlight primary paths to act, including Events, Action Planner, Tools, Donate, Volunteer, and Learn sections
Show a short list of featured upcoming events and webinars with links to the full events listing
Promote featured articles for beginners on topics like plastic pollution and energy saving
Provide prominent calls-to-action to start the lifestyle quiz, carbon calculator, and action planner

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click primary "Events" call-to-action or "View all events" link from featured events section
Click a curated hero link such as "See upcoming ocean webinars"
Click on a featured event card
Click featured "Learn about plastic pollution" link
Click on a featured article card
Click "Start an action plan" call-to-action
Click "Estimate your carbon footprint" call-to-action
Click "Take the lifestyle quiz" call-to-action
Click "Donate" or "Support projects" section link
Click "Volunteer near you" section link
Click "Go to my dashboard" shortcut

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry "Home"
Footer link "Home"
Direct entry via root URL or bookmarks

pages.name: Events & Programs
pages.description: Searchable and filterable list of in-person events and online webinars.
primary_functions: Let users filter events by ZIP or postal code, distance or radius, date range or month, event type (in-person, webinar), topic, and day of week or time of day
Allow sorting of events by date (soonest first) and other criteria
Display key details for each event such as title, date, weekday label, time, distance from ZIP, type, and category (for example, tree planting, ocean conservation)
Provide links from each event result to a detailed event page for bookmarking or registration

incoming_params.description: Optional ZIP/postal code to pre-populate the location filter.
Optional radius in miles to pre-populate the distance filter.
Optional event type preset such as 'webinar' or 'in_person'.
Optional event category preset such as 'tree_planting' or 'ocean_conservation'.
Optional topic filter preset like 'Oceans' or 'Plastic pollution'.
Optional date range preset key such as 'this_month' or 'next_60_days'.
Optional explicit start date (ISO string) for date range filter.
Optional explicit end date (ISO string) for date range filter.
Optional day-of-week pre-filter, e.g., 'saturday' or 'sunday'.
Optional time-of-day pre-filter such as 'evening'.
Optional sort key such as 'date_soonest_first'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an event title or card in the results list
Click "View my events" shortcut to open My Dashboard

access_methods.description: Header link "Events"
Footer link "Events & Webinars"
Links from Home or Dashboard into filtered event listings
Filters pre-populated using query parameters (e.g., ?type=webinar&topic=ocean_conservation)

pages.name: Event Detail
pages.description: Detailed page for a specific in-person event or online webinar.
primary_functions: Show full event information including description, exact date, weekday, time, location, distance, type, topic, and any requirements
Allow users to bookmark or save the event to My Events or Dashboard for future reference
Support event registration or sign-up for webinars, including name and email collection when required
Offer an option during registration to add the event or webinar to the user dashboard or My Events section

incoming_params.description: ID of the event to display details for.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to events" link
Click "View my events" or similar call-to-action after bookmarking or registering

access_methods.description: Accessed as event_detail.html?eventId={id} from listings and dashboard
Deep links from emails or shares can open this page with eventId

pages.name: Action Planner
pages.description: Interactive planner for building and saving personalized conservation action plans.
primary_functions: Provide a browsable action library opened by a Browse Actions or Add Actions control
Filter actions by estimated monthly cost (with a maximum cost slider or input and a minimum cost down to zero) and by impact rating or score
Sort available actions by impact (high to low) and other preferences, and add selected actions to the current plan
Display the current plan overview, allow users to name the plan (for example, Low-Cost High-Impact Plan), and save or update the 5-action plan

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "View in My Dashboard" from the plan overview

access_methods.description: Header link "Action Planner"
Links from Home and Dashboard to manage the current plan

pages.name: Carbon Footprint Calculator
pages.description: Tool to estimate household carbon emissions and set a reduction goal.
primary_functions: Collect baseline information about the household, including household size, number of bedrooms, transportation use (weekly driving distance and fuel type), and energy use (electricity in kWh and natural gas in therms where applicable)
Calculate and display the household's baseline annual carbon footprint with a clear results summary
Provide controls to set a carbon reduction goal as a percentage (using a slider or numeric input) and to name the goal (for example, 20% Reduction for 3-Person Home)
Save the reduction goal to the user profile so it can be referenced later from the calculator and dashboard

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "View this goal in My Dashboard" after saving a reduction goal

access_methods.description: Header link "Carbon Footprint Calculator"
Links from Home hero tools section and Dashboard

pages.name: Conservation Projects
pages.description: Directory of conservation projects that users can support with donations or pledges.
primary_functions: Filter projects by category such as wildlife, oceans, forests, and other conservation themes
Filter projects by transparency or accountability rating (for example, 4 or 5 stars only) and by suggested monthly donation level (for example, 30 dollars or less)
Sort projects by suggested monthly donation (low to high) and other attributes like impact or name
Provide links to detailed project pages where users can set up one-time or monthly pledges

incoming_params.description: Optional project category preset such as 'wildlife' or 'oceans'.
Optional minimum transparency rating to pre-filter results.
Optional maximum suggested monthly donation to pre-filter projects.
Optional sort key such as 'suggested_monthly_low_to_high'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a project name or card in the project directory
Click "View my pledges" link

access_methods.description: Header link "Donate" goes to Conservation Projects
Footer link "Donate to Projects"
Links from Home and Dashboard into pre-filtered project lists
Category and filter presets provided via query parameters

pages.name: Project Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a specific conservation project with options to donate or start a monthly pledge.
primary_functions: Present a full description of the project, including goals, activities, geographic focus, and transparency or accountability rating
Offer donation options including frequency selection (for example, Monthly) and a free-form amount field for pledges
Collect donor details such as name and email address within a clear pledge form
Process and confirm the start of a recurring monthly pledge, summarizing the chosen amount and frequency

incoming_params.description: ID of the conservation project to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to projects" link
Click "View this pledge in My Dashboard" after creating a pledge

access_methods.description: Accessed as project_detail.html?projectId={id}
Deep-linked from emails or project promotions

pages.name: Articles & Guides
pages.description: Searchable article library for learning about environmental topics.
primary_functions: Allow keyword search for articles, such as searching for plastic pollution basics
Filter articles by publication date range (for example, last 2 years), estimated reading time, difficulty or level (for example, beginner or introductory), and topic
Sort article results by most recent, relevance, or popularity
Enable quick bookmarking or Add to List actions on articles and open individual articles in a detailed view

incoming_params.description: Initial search query string, e.g., 'plastic pollution basics'.
Optional topic preset for the article list.
Optional difficulty level preset such as 'beginner'.
Optional maximum reading time in minutes.
Optional date range preset key such as 'last_2_years'.
Optional sort key such as 'most_recent'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an article title or card in the search results
Click "My Reading Lists" link from the article library

access_methods.description: Header link "Learn" goes to Articles & Guides
Footer link "Learn Articles"
Links from Home and Dashboard to filtered article listings
Initial search and filters set via query parameters

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Full content view for an individual article or guide.
primary_functions: Display the complete article content along with metadata such as publication date, reading time, and difficulty level
Provide controls to bookmark the article or add it directly to one or more reading lists
Offer navigation to related or recommended articles on similar conservation topics

incoming_params.description: ID of the article to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to articles" link
Click on a related article link
Click "Manage reading lists" after adding article to a list

access_methods.description: Accessed as article_detail.html?articleId={id}
Deep links from search results, reading lists, and dashboard

pages.name: My Reading Lists
pages.description: Area for organizing saved articles into named reading lists.
primary_functions: Show all articles the user has bookmarked or tentatively added for reading
Allow users to create new reading lists, name them (for example, Plastic Pollution Starters), rename, or delete lists
Support adding and removing specific articles to and from selected reading lists using Add to List controls or drag-and-drop
Provide access to open any saved article directly from a list

incoming_params.description: Optional ID of a specific reading list to focus on when the page loads.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an article title within any reading list

access_methods.description: Links from Articles & Guides and Dashboard to manage reading lists
Optional readingListId parameter used to open a specific list

pages.name: Volunteer & Groups
pages.description: Listing page for volunteer opportunities and ongoing local groups.
primary_functions: Display volunteer options with a tab or toggle to focus on Ongoing Groups as distinct from one-time opportunities
Filter groups by location using ZIP code and a distance or radius setting, by cause or focus area (such as wildlife or wildlife habitat), and by average rating
Sort filtered results by rating (high to low), distance, or name
Provide links from each opportunity or group entry to a detailed group page

incoming_params.description: ZIP/postal code to pre-populate the volunteer location filter.
Distance in miles to pre-populate the radius filter.
Optional volunteer focus area preset such as 'wildlife'.
Optional minimum average rating to pre-filter groups.
Optional sort key such as 'rating_high_to_low'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a volunteer group name or card
Click "View my groups" link

access_methods.description: Header link "Volunteer"
Footer link "Volunteer"
Location and rating filters can be pre-set via URL

pages.name: Volunteer Group Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific ongoing volunteer group.
primary_functions: Describe the group's mission, primary focus (such as wildlife), typical activities, schedule, and average rating
Allow users to join the group or sign up via a clear Join Group button
Collect participation preferences including desired participation frequency (for example, Weekly) and save those preferences
Confirm group membership and provide any next steps or contact information

incoming_params.description: ID of the volunteer group to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to volunteer listings" link
Click "View this group in My Dashboard" after joining

access_methods.description: Accessed as group_detail.html?groupId={id}
Deep links from Dashboard and external communications

pages.name: Lifestyle Quiz
pages.description: Interactive quiz that assesses lifestyle and recommends conservation challenges.
primary_functions: Let users start the lifestyle quiz and progress through sections such as Home Energy, Transportation, and Waste with answer options that represent typical usage patterns
Collect responses and generate a results summary highlighting impact areas and improvement opportunities
Display a list of recommended challenges and allow filtering of these recommendations by category, such as Energy Saving, and by difficulty level such as Easy
Enable users to activate selected challenges using Activate or Add to My Challenges controls

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Go to My Challenges" after activating recommended challenges

access_methods.description: Header link "Lifestyle Quiz"
Links from Home and Dashboard to start the quiz

pages.name: My Dashboard
pages.description: Personal dashboard summarizing the user's active challenges, saved events, goals, and plans.
primary_functions: Provide a My Challenges section showing all activated challenges, with controls to set or adjust the frequency or cadence (for example, Daily) for each challenge and save updates
Offer a My Events section listing bookmarked and registered events and webinars added from event and webinar detail pages
Summarize key elements of the user's conservation activities, such as the current action plan, saved carbon reduction goal, and active donation pledges
Link out to manage items in more detail, including opening the action planner, carbon calculator, reading lists, and project details

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Find more events" from the My Events section
Click on an event in the upcoming events list
Click "Edit action plan" from the action plan summary
Click "Update carbon footprint" from the carbon goal summary
Click "Support more projects" from the pledges section
Click on a project name in the pledges list
Click "Manage reading lists" from the reading lists summary
Click "Find more groups" from the volunteer memberships section
Click on a volunteer group name in the memberships list
Click "Retake lifestyle quiz" from the challenges section

access_methods.description: Header link "Dashboard"
Links from tools and detail pages after saving or activating items

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background on the organization or initiative behind the conservation website.
primary_functions: Explain the mission, vision, and main focus areas of the conservation effort, such as forests, oceans, wildlife, and climate
Introduce the approach to education, tools, and community engagement offered on the site
Provide context and trust-building information to support user engagement and donations

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Contact us" from mission or team sections
Click a call-to-action such as "Support our projects"

access_methods.description: Footer link "About"
Linked from external communications describing the initiative

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact page for questions, feedback, and support.
primary_functions: Provide a contact form for users to submit questions, suggestions, or issues related to events, tools, or donations
Display alternative contact information as appropriate, such as email addresses or mailing information
Link to the FAQ page for quick access to common answers

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "View FAQs" link shown alongside the contact form

access_methods.description: Footer link "Contact"
Linked from emails or external sites for support
Submitting the contact form triggers submitContactForm

pages.name: FAQ
pages.description: Frequently asked questions about using the site and its tools.
primary_functions: Answer common questions about events, webinars, donations, the carbon calculator, the lifestyle quiz, and volunteering
Clarify how saved items such as plans, goals, reading lists, and challenges work in this single-user context
Provide links to relevant tools, sections, or contact options for additional help

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Still need help? Contact us"
Click a contextual link in an events-related FAQ answer
Click a contextual link in a calculator-related FAQ answer

access_methods.description: Footer link "FAQ"
Linked from Contact page and help prompts across the site

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Policy explaining how user data and preferences are handled on the site.
primary_functions: Describe what data is collected through tools, pledges, and saved items and how it is used
Explain data retention, cookie usage, and any analytics practices in clear language
Provide information on user choices regarding data and ways to reach out with privacy questions

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Contact us about privacy" link within the policy

access_methods.description: Footer link "Privacy Policy"
Linked from external policies or consent dialogs

header_links.description: Homepage with entry points to events, tools, learning, and actions
Browse and search articles and guides on conservation topics
View and filter in-person events and online webinars
Create and manage a personalized conservation action plan
Estimate your household carbon footprint and set a reduction goal
Take a lifestyle quiz and activate daily conservation challenges
Support conservation projects with one-time or monthly donations
Find local volunteer opportunities and ongoing groups
View your challenges, saved events, goals, and plans

footer_links.description: Learn more about this conservation initiative
Get in touch with questions or feedback
Frequently asked questions about using the site
Access the full library of conservation articles
Browse all upcoming events and online programs
Find volunteer roles and groups near you
Read how your data and privacy are protected
